name: localfin
description: Local personal finance tracker — React + Node.js

scripts.dev: node scripts/banner.js && concurrently --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgCyan.bold" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
